name: QA 507
description:
PCP QA Test No. 507

exercises the pcp(1) works with an archive generates from

our own pmlogger config file for it.  also checks bug #640234



Copyright (c) 1995-2002 Silicon Graphics, Inc.  All Rights Reserved.



check-group-exclude: pmdumplog



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2004 reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 507

exercises the pcp(1) works with an archive generates from

our own pmlogger config file for it. also checks bug #640234

Copyright (c) 1995-2002 Silicon Graphics, Inc. All Rights Reserved.

check-group-exclude: pmdumplog

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2004 reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 507.out.bad)
7a8,20
> 1,10c1
> < Performance Co-Pilot configuration on HOST:
> < 
> <  platform: Linux HOST 5.15.0-1068-azure #77~20.04.1-Ubuntu SMP Fri Jun 21 22:05:38 UTC 2024 x86_64
> <  hardware: 4 cpus, 2 disks, 1 node, 15991MB RAM
> <  timezone: UTC
> <  services: pmcd
> <      pmcd: Version 6.3.0-0.20240726.1b730bf, 15 agents, 1 client
> <      pmda: root pmcd proc pmproxy xfs sample sampledso linux nfsclient
> <            mmv kvm jbd2 dm openmetrics simple
> <  pmlogger: primary logger: /var/log/pcp/pmlogger/HOST/20240726.19.25
> ---
> > pcp-summary: Cannot connect to PMCD on host "HOST": Connection refused
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
